summary: Completed comprehensive testing of e-commerce Shop feature for ASR Enterprises. All backend APIs (15/15 tests passed) and frontend UI flows working correctly. Shop page displays 4 products, category filtering works, add to cart functionality verified, checkout flow with both COD and Razorpay options working, CRM Shop tab showing products and orders management.

issues: Products display placeholder sun icons instead of actual product images - no images uploaded for products yet

action_items: Add actual product images to the 4 sample products via CRM Product Management or direct API upload
Consider adding product image placeholders that are more visually appealing (e.g., category-specific icons)
seed_data_creation: Created multiple test orders via backend tests (TEST_ prefixed customer names)
context_for_next_testing_agent: E-commerce Shop feature fully functional. Shop page at /shop with 4 products (MC4 Connector Set, Exide Battery, Luminous Inverter, Loom Solar Panel). CRM Shop tab accessible via Admin Dashboard > CRM System > Shop tab. Test orders created during testing visible in Orders tab.

shop_page_display.details: Shop page at /shop displays 4 products with prices, stock status, category filter, search

category_filtering.details: Filter by Solar Panels, Inverters, Batteries, Accessories, Services all working

add_to_cart.details: Add to cart updates cart badge, cart sidebar shows items with quantity controls

checkout_form.details: Customer details form, delivery options (Store Pickup FREE, Home Delivery ₹100 Patna only), payment options (COD, Razorpay)

order_creation_api.details: POST /api/shop/orders creates orders with unique order numbers (ASR prefix)

whatsapp_notification.details: WhatsApp notification URL returned on order creation with admin phone 8877896889

crm_notification.details: CRM messages created for new orders

shop_tab_in_crm.details: Shop tab visible in CRM Dashboard navigation with Products and Orders sub-tabs

product_management_crm.details: Products tab shows 4 products with edit/delete actions, Add Product button present

order_management_crm.details: Orders tab shows all orders with status dropdown to update order status

shop_stats_api.details: GET /api/shop/stats returns total_products, total_orders, pending_orders, total_revenue

navigation_shop_link.details: Shop link in homepage navigation bar, clicks navigates to /shop

api_endpoints_tested: POST /api/shop/orders - 200 OK, creates order with WhatsApp URL
ui_tests_performed: Shop page load with products display
Category filtering (Solar Panels filter shows 1 product)
Add to cart functionality (2 products added)
Checkout modal with all form fields
CRM Shop tab with Products and Orders management
